title: Here's the Apple Pencil Lineup With New Pro Model
content:
With the launch of the refreshed iPad Air and iPad Pro models, Apple introduced a new "Apple Pencil Pro." No ‚ÄåApple Pencil‚Äå options have been discontinued, which means there are now four total Apple Pencils to choose from.


While the updated ‚ÄåiPad Pro‚Äå and ‚ÄåiPad Air‚Äå are compatible with the ‚ÄåApple Pencil‚Äå Pro and the USB-C ‚ÄåApple Pencil‚Äå, they do not work with the ‚ÄåApple Pencil‚Äå 2. Older iPads are also not able to work with the ‚ÄåApple Pencil‚Äå Pro.

Apple Pencil Pro



  • M4 ‚ÄåiPad Pro‚Äå

  • M2 ‚ÄåiPad Air‚Äå


Apple Pencil USB-C



  • M4 ‚ÄåiPad Pro‚Äå

  • ‚ÄåM2‚Äå ‚ÄåiPad Air‚Äå

  • 12.9-inch ‚ÄåiPad Pro‚Äå (4th gen and later)

  • 11-inch ‚ÄåiPad Pro‚Äå (1st gen and later)

  • ‚ÄåiPad Air‚Äå (4th and 5th gen)

  • iPad mini (6th gen)


Apple Pencil 2



  • 12.9-inch ‚ÄåiPad Pro‚Äå (3rd, 4th, 5th, and 6th gen)

  • 11-inch ‚ÄåiPad Pro‚Äå (1st, 2nd, 3rd, and 4th gen)

  • ‚ÄåiPad Air‚Äå (4th and 5th gen)

  • ‚ÄåiPad mini‚Äå (6th gen)


Apple Pencil 1



  • 12.9-inch ‚ÄåiPad Pro‚Äå (1st and 2nd gen)

  • 10.5-inch ‚ÄåiPad Pro‚Äå

  • 9.7-inch ‚ÄåiPad Pro‚Äå

  • ‚ÄåiPad Air‚Äå (3rd gen)

  • ‚ÄåiPad mini‚Äå (5th gen)

  • iPad (6th gen and later)


The ‚ÄåApple Pencil‚Äå Pro and the ‚ÄåApple Pencil‚Äå 2 are both priced at $129, while the ‚ÄåApple Pencil‚Äå 1 is priced at $99 and the ‚ÄåApple Pencil‚Äå USB-C is $79.

Compared to older ‚ÄåApple Pencil‚Äå models, the ‚ÄåApple Pencil‚Äå Pro supports squeeze gestures, roll gestures, haptic feedback, and Find My.
